hero.badge: The leading platform for teaching English with native teachers
hero.description: We combine native teachers with AI-powered progress tracking in a safe and enjoyable experience designed for Arab children.

preview.sentence: Well done, Omar! Now say: The cat is in the bag.

trusted.title: Built around global English teaching standards

features.title: Why native teachers?
features.description: Traditional teaching may explain grammar, but it rarely builds real speaking fluency. Readmint focuses on how children actually hear, repeat, and speak.
checks: Teachers from the UK and USA

items.title: Authentic pronunciation
items.desc: Children learn the sounds from the source, not from a translated accent.

items.title: Confidence in speaking
items.desc: Early exposure reduces fear and makes English feel natural.

items.title: Cultural awareness
items.desc: Language becomes a living way of expression, not a memorized subject.

items.title: Teaching quality
items.desc: Certified teachers with experience working with children online.

results.title: Clear visibility into what your child is learning.
results.description: Parents can review performance, pronunciation milestones, and home reinforcement tasks every week.

items.title: Session recordings
items.desc: Review every live lesson whenever you need.

items.title: Pronunciation indicators
items.desc: Spot real pronunciation improvement over time.

report.recommendationText: Focus on consonant sound drills to push pronunciation above 90%.

items: Actual sentence usage inside live sessions.

curriculum.heroTitle: Built for the mind and personality of Arab children.
curriculum.heroDescription: We do not import rigid content. We build a path that respects language transfer challenges and leads toward real speaking fluency.

methodology.title: Gamified learning
methodology.desc: Every lesson feels like progress, with points and visible wins that keep children engaged.

methodology.title: Language immersion
methodology.desc: Native-teacher sessions expose children to correct spoken English every week.

methodology.title: AI tracking
methodology.desc: We identify pronunciation and fluency obstacles common among Arab learners.

curriculum.levelsSubtitle: From first sounds to full conversations.

levels.name: Foundation Level (Pre-A1)
levels.desc: This stage builds a positive relationship with English through sounds, visuals, and short routines.

levels.name: Beginner Level (A1)
levels.desc: Children begin forming correct sentences and expressing simple needs and ideas.

levels.name: Developing Level (A2)
levels.desc: The focus shifts toward storytelling, longer comprehension, and more natural dialogue.

comparison.title: Why is the Readmint curriculum different?
comparison.subtitle: Because it is designed around the actual obstacles Arab learners face.
challenges: Confusing sounds like P and B because they do not exist the same way in Arabic.
Literal translation from Arabic into English sentence order.
Fear of making mistakes while speaking.
solutions: Safe one-on-one or small-group speaking practice.

cta.title: Ready to identify your child's level?

teachers.heroTitle: Our teachers are not just instructors. They are motivating companions for children.
teachers.heroDescription: We select a very small percentage of applicants to ensure native fluency, teaching quality, and child-safe delivery.

teachers.qualityTitle: Strict standards for your child's safety.
teachers.qualityDescription: We hire for both language quality and child-safe teaching behavior.

qualityItems.title: Background checks
qualityItems.desc: Every teacher goes through a formal screening process in their home country.

qualityItems.title: Certified teaching
qualityItems.desc: Teachers hold recognized qualifications such as TEFL or CELTA.

qualityItems.title: Ongoing monitoring
qualityItems.desc: Sessions are reviewed regularly to maintain teaching quality.

teachers.qualityCtaTitle: Ready to learn with the best teachers?
teachers.qualityCtaDescription: After the placement test, we help you choose the best-fit teacher.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about the platform and the plans.

items.question: How is my child's level determined?
items.answer: We use a free placement assessment at the start to measure vocabulary, listening, pronunciation, and basic speaking, then recommend the most suitable package.

items.question: Who teaches on the platform?
items.answer: All teachers are native English speakers from countries such as the UK, the USA, and Canada, with recognized teaching credentials.

items.question: What if my child misses a live session?
items.answer: If you notify us at least 24 hours in advance, the session can be rescheduled. Without prior notice, it is counted as missed.

items.question: Can I track my child's progress?
items.answer: Yes. Parents get dashboards, weekly reports, and session records showing measurable progress over time.

items.question: Which package is best to start with?
items.answer: That depends on the placement result, but the Progress package fits many children because it balances live teaching and independent reinforcement.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: We are here to answer your questions and help you choose the best option for your child.
contact.emailText: We reply to all emails within 24 hours.
contact.phoneText: Available Sunday to Thursday, 9 AM to 5 PM.
contact.submittedDescription: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: By using Readmint, you agree to these terms. The platform is designed to provide high-quality online English education for children through native teachers and structured plans.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual property
sections.body: All platform materials, including text, visuals, audio, video, and software, remain the property of Readmint and may not be reused without written permission.

sections.title: 3. Subscription and payment
list: Services are offered on a term-based subscription model.
Payment is collected in advance to reserve the student's seat.
Fees are generally non-refundable after the first week of the term.
Missed sessions require notice at least 24 hours ahead for rescheduling.

sections.title: 4. User conduct
sections.body: Parents and learners are expected to follow respectful conduct during sessions. Readmint may suspend accounts in cases of abuse or unsafe behavior.

sections.title: 5. Changes to the terms
sections.body: We may update these terms when needed and will notify users of material changes through the platform or by email.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: We are committed to protecting your data and your child's data.

sections.title: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: We collect only the information required to deliver personalized learning, such as the student name, age, level, guardian email, and performance records.

sections.title: 2. How we use the data
list: To personalize the learning plan based on the child's level.
To generate reports for parents and guardians.
To improve pronunciation evaluation systems using anonymized data only.

sections.title: 3. Child privacy and recordings
sections.body: Session recordings are stored securely for quality review and parent access only, and they are limited to authorized roles.

sections.title: 4. Third-party sharing
sections.body: We do not sell user data. Limited data may be shared only with trusted service providers such as payment partners under strong protection standards.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
sections.body: Parents may request a copy of the child data or request deletion after the subscription ends, subject to legal and operational obligations.

placementTest.introBadge: The result determines the best-fit term package
placementTest.introTitle: Start the smart assessment in 5 minutes
placementTest.introDescription: The assessment checks vocabulary, listening, core grammar, and simple expression. At the end, the parent receives a recommended package and a learning target.
placementTest.resultDescription: This recommendation is based on the answers and is designed for one full academic term.
placementTest.startSubscription: Start subscription for the current term

questions.prompt: Choose the correct translation of the word: Apple
You heard the word Cat. Which option is correct?
Complete the sentence: I ___ a student.
Choose the sentence that means: I like reading.
If someone asks What is your name?, which answer fits best?
